message:
test(why): Add comprehensive unit tests for why command

Adds 19 unit tests covering all major functionality:

Bullet lookup:
- Find bullet by exact ID
- Return error for non-existent bullet (JSON and text output)

WhyResult building:
- Include bullet metadata (category, maturity, dates, counts)
- Include reasoning when present
- Extract evidence from reasoning quotes
- Include feedback history (sorted by timestamp)
- Calculate effectiveness level

Source sessions:
- Include source session paths in result
- Limit to 5 sessions by default
- Show 10 sessions with verbose flag

Edge cases:
- Handle bullet with no evidence gracefully
- Handle deprecated bullets
- Handle anti-pattern bullets (isNegative)
- Handle special characters in content

Text output:
- Display formatted output with all sections
- Show next step suggestions

Diary integration:
- Handle empty diary directory gracefully
- Include diaryEntries field in result

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
